case_title: CACH, LLC VS. MICHAEL DVORKIN et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-25-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
POS; DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DVORKIN, MICHAEL AN INDIVIDUAL

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAR-25-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
